name: co.thinair/geo
description: Full-stack geo tools for AI agents via MCP — one server covering geocoding, multi-profile routing (auto, truck, bicycle, pedestrian), isochrones, live traffic, weather, and place search. Coordinates you can actually route from: intersection-level precision with confidence scores, no silent fallbacks. Trucking constraints (hazmat, dimensions, weight, time/distance) native. 10 tools (geocode, reverse_geocode, batch_geocode, directions, isochrone, traffic, weather, search_places, explore, quota) plus an issue_api_key utility for the API-key issuance flow. OAuth 2.1 (keyless) or API key auth. Globally edge-deployed, flat pricing at scale.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Optional. Most clients (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.) complete OAuth at first use — no token paste required. For non-OAuth clients, paste `Bearer ta_live_...` (or `Bearer ta_trial_...`); get a free key (15 req/day, no card) at https://geo.thinair.co/connect.
